description: Use this API to change the value of a character ICON (i.e., an element of the CHRICN array) of a designated renewable related model at a specified renewable machine. The corresponding integer ICON is set to 0. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = change_wnmod_chricn(ibus, id, name, j, chdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_wnmod_chricn(ibus, id, name, j, chdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Renewable machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a renewable machine model.
no <model type> model at this machine.
the <model type> model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no input ICONs used in model NAME.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
machine is not designated as a renewable machine in power flow.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
